lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Well, if it isn't our very own sledder! What can I do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another law talisman?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Well, I've got one here you can have for 1,000 coins if you'd like it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll take it.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Looks like you don't have enough money to afford it just now, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Looks like you don't have any room to carry it just now, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you put some spikes on my Climbing boots?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: For you, no problem.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Do you realise that you can only use the Climbing boots right now? The Spiked boots can only be used in the Icelands but no ones been able to get there for years!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, but I still want them.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Sorry, I'll need an Iron bar to make the spikes.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Anything else before I get on with my work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh OK, I'll leave them thanks.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Anything else before I get on with my work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make me another sled?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Yeah sure, have you got the maple or yew logs, an iron bar and some rope?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I haven't got everything yet.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Well, unfortunately I can't make the sled without all the materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I need for the sled wax again?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: You will need some wax and some swamp tar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get wax from?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: I don't know. I'm a smith! But maybe you should look for some bees.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get swamp tar from?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: The swamp of course! It's south of Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What else do I need?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: You will also need a cake tin to store the wax in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Thank you, come again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is your son getting on?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: He is getting on fine! He has just been promoted to Sergeant! I'm really proud of him!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm happy for you!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Anything else before I get on with my work?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: He is getting on fine! He has just started his basic training and has already been promoted to corporal! I'm really proud of him!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm happy for you!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Anything else before I get on with my work?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: He was captured by those blasted trolls! I don't know what to do. Even the imperial guard are too afraid to go rescue him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Talk to Denulth, he can tell you all about it. Anything else before I get on with my work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it OK if I use your anvil?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: So you're a smithy are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I dabble.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: A fellow smith is welcome to use my anvil!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Anything else before I get on with my work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: No, try again.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: I have a question for you.
